mapper.insert:
SELECT 't_' || SEQ_MEMBER.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO MEMBER ( USER_NO, USER_ID, USER_PW, USER_NM, USER_RRNO, USER_TELNO ) VALUES ( #{userNo}, #{userId}, #{userPw}, #{userNm}, #{userRrno}, #{userTelno} )
INSERT INTO HSHLD_HEAD ( USER_NO, HO_NO, INOUT_CD, MOVE_IN_DT, HEAD_YN )VALUES ( #{userNo}, #{hoNo}, #{inoutCd}, SYSDATE, #{headYn} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM AUTH WHERE USER_ROLE_CD = 'ROLE_MEMBER' AND USER_NO LIKE 't%'
SELECT M.* FROM MEMBER M JOIN AUTH A ON M.USER_NO = A.USER_NO WHERE M.USER_NO LIKE 't%' AND A.USER_ROLE_CD = 'ROLE_MEMBER'
